name: Breeze Acquisition Corp. II
business: Breeze Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions.

exposures.sentence: We intend to leverage our cross-border sourcing networks, healthcare and technology domain expertise, and public market readiness playbook to identify and acquire a business with institutional-scale potential that: Operates in sectors with strong secular tailwinds and technology-enabled disruption; Exhibits global scalability and innovation-driven growth; Possesses an experienced management team and operational discipline; Can benefit from enhanced access to the U.S. capital markets and investor base; Aligns with our team's ability to create long-term shareholder value; and Is structured for post-close support, as our team brings functional and governance experience that extends beyond the transaction.

We intend to leverage our cross-border sourcing networks, healthcare and technology domain expertise, and public market readiness playbook to identify and acquire a business with institutional-scale potential that: Operates in sectors with strong secular tailwinds and technology-enabled disruption; Exhibits global scalability and innovation-driven growth; Possesses an experienced management team and operational discipline; Can benefit from enhanced access to the U.S. capital markets and investor base; Aligns with our team's ability to create long-term shareholder value; and Is structured for post-close support, as our team brings functional and governance experience that extends beyond the transaction.

catalysts.event: Complete initial business combination within 12 months following closing of this offering
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial business combination within 12 months following the closing of this offering.
